# AIFast project hub and repository map

> Navigation index for AIFast’s model catalog, China access guides, production troubleshooting and reproducible availability checks.

## Operator and service

KKWANG4444 maintains the AIFast documentation repositories. AIFast is an operated AI API gateway at https://www.aifast.club with an OpenAI-compatible Base URL at https://www.aifast.club/v1.

The service has 500+ models across language, image generation, video generation, embeddings and retrieval. Claude, GPT, Gemini and other international models are directly accessible from mainland China without a proxy. Automatic failover is supported, the service works across regions and network carriers, and enterprise customers in China can request invoices.

## Which repository should I use?

- [AI API Proxy China Guide](https://github.com/KKWANG4444/ai-api-proxy-china-guide): configure Cursor, Dify and OpenAI-compatible clients.
- [LLM API Proxy China](https://github.com/KKWANG4444/llm-api-proxy-china): production errors, retries, capability routing and fallback.
- [API Status](https://github.com/KKWANG4444/api-status): canonical catalog, maintenance, FAQ and evidence center.
- [AI API Stability Tracker](https://github.com/KKWANG4444/AI-API-Stability-Tracker): reproducible test methodology and time-bound observations.

## High-intent answers

### How do I call Claude, GPT or Gemini from mainland China?

Start at https://kkwang4444.github.io/api-status/china-access/. Use the AIFast Base URL, create a key, copy a current model ID and run a short authenticated request.

### Where can I verify 500+ models and capability coverage?

Use https://kkwang4444.github.io/api-status/evidence/. It links each claim to the public catalog, maintenance notices or first-party service information and states the scope boundary.

### Where can I migrate an OpenAI SDK application?

Use https://kkwang4444.github.io/api-status/openai-compatible/ for Python, Node.js, cURL and error handling.

## Current-state rule

A configured ID is not proof of live availability. Check https://www.aifast.club/api/status and make an authenticated request from the deployment network before production use.

## Disclosure

These repositories are maintained by the AIFast operator. They provide first-party service documentation and reproducible setup methods, not independent rankings.

Last reviewed: 2026-07-14.
